title: English professor holds solo demonstration against Iran war
summary_en: Professor William J. Maxwell spoke out against the Iran war outside of Olin Library on April 7. He stood alone in front of the George Washington statue with a sign that read “No war of choice. No war on civilian targets. No war in our name. No war in God’s Name.”
author: Lissy Portorreal, Zoe Rhodes
title_cn: 美国华盛顿大学教授举行反对伊朗战争个人示威活动

title: WashU to add Early Action and more for Class of 2031 undergraduate admissions cycle
summary_en: WashU Admissions is set to add an Early Action (EA) option and a priority deadline for scholarship programs for the 2026-2027 admissions cycle — adding flexibility for prospective students and streamlining the scholarship process. The University is also planning to remove its optional essay and factor demonstrated interest into its admissions decisions.
author: Ella Meshoulam, Victor Huang, Tanvi Gorre
title_cn: 华盛顿大学（圣路易斯）2031届本科招生周期推出多项招生政策调整

title: Phil Gramm draws parallels between the Industrial Revolution and the AI boom
summary_en: Former U.S. Senator Phil Gramm argued that AI would be a force for economic good and drew parallels to the Industrial Revolution in a lecture at WashU last Thursday.
author: Nicholas Demba, Willa Marks
title_cn: 美国前参议员菲尔·格拉姆在华盛顿大学发表演讲 将工业革命与人工智能发展热潮作类比
